title: XIFT v1.0 Extension: encryption
description: End-to-end payload encryption metadata (HPKE / age). Source: xift-1.0-spec-extension-encryption.md §3, §4.

recipient_kid.description: DID URL fragment resolving to the recipient's X25519 encryption key.

ephemeral_pubkey.description: Standard base64 (with padding) of the 32-byte X25519 ephemeral public key (RFC 9180 §5).

nonce.description: Standard base64 (with padding) of the 12-byte (96-bit) AEAD nonce.
